items.title: One of the most affordable 27-inch QD-OLED 240Hz gaming monitors is now down to its lowest price at $340
items.summary:
AOC has a long list of value-packed gaming monitors for folks looking to buy a new display on a budget, and one of them just happened to hit a new all-time low. Amazon is currently offering one of the brand’s 27-inch QD-OLED 240Hz monitors down at $339.99 shipped. Originally hit the scene carrying a $400 price tag, this particular model has lately been going for $380. Today’s deal, however, takes an additional $40 off its usual going rate, to mark a new best price to beat. While we’ve seen discounts on other AOC models recently, this is the first time this unit has dropped below the $350 mark. It is, in fact, now going for even less than the 180Hz variant of this display that dropped to $370 all-time low last month. It’s a solid price to consider for a 240Hz QD-OLED model, so be sure to snag it after getting more details below.

more…
